---
pagetitle: "Daniel Regalado Cardoso"
page-layout: custom
section-divs: false
toc: false
css: styles.css
---

::: {.hero-section}

::: {.hero-content}

![](assets/headshot.png){.headshot alt="Daniel Regalado"}

# Daniel Regalado Cardoso {.hero-name}

### Data Scientist · AI/ML Engineer · Business Analyst {.hero-title}

::: {.hero-tagline}
Building LLM applications, multi-agent AI systems, and predictive analytics solutions at the intersection of data science, business strategy, and engineering.
:::

::: {.hero-links}
[{{< fa brands linkedin >}} LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/daniel-regalado-cardoso-81551b16b){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg target="_blank"}
[{{< fa brands github >}} GitHub](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami){.btn .btn-outline-dark .btn-lg target="_blank"}
[{{< fa solid file-arrow-down >}} Resume](Daniel_Regalado_Resume.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-lg target="_blank"}
[{{< fa solid envelope >}} Email](mailto:dxr1491@miami.edu){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-lg target="_blank"}
:::

:::

:::


::: {.section-container}

## Recognition {.section-title}

::: {.awards-grid}

::: {.award-card}
::: {.award-year}
March 2026
:::

#### Distinguished Achievement Award

ASA South Florida Student Data Challenge — Top 10% for HDL cholesterol prediction using NHANES data with CatBoost (R² = 0.75). Winner Showcase at FIU.
:::

::: {.award-card}
::: {.award-year}
2025
:::

#### 2nd Place — MS Energy Business Management

Ranked 2nd out of 16 graduates in the Master of Science in Energy Business Management program at Universidad del Valle de Guatemala.
:::

:::

:::


::: {.section-container .section-alt}

## Highlights {.section-title}

::: {.section-subtitle}
Recent work.
:::

::: {.projects-grid}

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid building >}} AI for Equitable Public Transit
**Deloitte Capstone** · Jan 2026 – Present

Predictive models integrating Census ACS, GTFS, and ArcGIS data to identify transit equity gaps in Miami-Dade with SHAP-based interpretability.

`Python` `SHAP` `GTFS` `ArcGIS`

[{{< fa brands github >}} Repo](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/CapstoneProject-AI-for-Equitable-Transportation){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid robot >}} AI Scheduling Assistant
**UHealth Bascom Palmer · Capstone** · Sep 2025 – Present

Multi-agent LLM chatbot using LangGraph + GPT-4 Turbo to automate patient scheduling across 100+ providers, with RAG and real-time monitoring.

`LangGraph` `LangChain` `GPT-4` `RAG` `ChromaDB`
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid heart-pulse >}} HDL Cholesterol Prediction
**ASA Data Challenge — Top 10%** · 2026

CatBoost model on NHANES data (R² = 0.75) with domain-guided feature engineering and SHAP analysis.

`CatBoost` `SHAP` `NHANES`

[{{< fa brands github >}} Repo](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/hdl-cholesterol-prediction){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid chart-line >}} DiagBoostTS
**Python Library** · 2025 – Present

Iterative diagnostic boosting for time series forecasting — systematic EDA → Stationarity → Model → Evaluate pipeline.

`Python` `Time Series` `XGBoost` `SARIMA`

[{{< fa brands github >}} Repo](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/diagboost-ts){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

:::

::: {style="text-align: center; margin-top: 2rem;"}
[View all projects →](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-dark}
:::

:::


::: {.section-container}

::: {.connect-section}

::: {.connect-heading}
Let's connect.
:::

I'm actively looking for opportunities in Data Science, AI/ML Engineering, and Business Analytics.

::: {.connect-links}
[{{< fa brands linkedin >}} LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/daniel-regalado-cardoso-81551b16b){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg target="_blank"}
[{{< fa solid envelope >}} dxr1491@miami.edu](mailto:dxr1491@miami.edu){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-lg target="_blank"}
[{{< fa brands github >}} GitHub](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami){.btn .btn-outline-dark .btn-lg target="_blank"}
:::

:::

:::
